intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.inventory_reconciliation: The registry provided does not match the visual evidence. All pots currently contain only soil and debris (eggshells). No living botanical specimens are visible in the current frame.

plant_audit.p1: No specimen detected. Soil appears undisturbed.
plant_audit.p2: No specimen detected. Soil appears undisturbed.
plant_audit.p3: Rabbit anchor present, but the Pothos specimen is absent. The pot is devoid of plant matter.
plant_audit.p4: No specimen detected. Only eggshell fragments remain.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Dark, damp, and consistent across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of crushed eggshells in the black pot (formerly P4/P2 area).
biome_observations.surface_anomalies: The desk surface is clear of organic matter; the environment appears to have been cleared of all vegetation.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows a single green stem/leaf in the black pot.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t2: The green stem shows signs of wilting/postural collapse.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_current: Total disappearance of all plant matter. The biome has transitioned from a managed indoor garden to an empty soil-only state.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: All specimens are confirmed as 'Dead/Lost'. The lack of any photosynthetic tissue indicates a total collapse of the indoor botanical system.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of eggshells suggests a failed attempt at soil amendment or a non-botanical intervention that did not prevent the loss of the specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete systemic failure of the botanical collection. Starting from the earliest image, which showed a single struggling specimen, the sequence documents a rapid decline leading to the total absence of plant life. The current state is characterized by empty pots and soil debris, indicating that the 'String of Nickels', 'Mexican Mint', 'Pothos', and 'Silver Guest' have all been removed or have perished.
